items.name: KFPL - Pittsburgh Branch
items.access_script: Email contact@kfpl.ca or visit 80 Gore Rd, Kingston, ON K7K 6X6. Library Card for loans required. No fees.

items.name: KFPL - Rideau Heights Branch
items.access_script: Visit https://www.kfpl.ca.

items.name: KFPL Learning Programs
items.access_script: Email contact@kfpl.ca or visit 130 Johnson St, Kingston, ON K7L 1X8 or visit https://www.kfpl.ca/programs. Library Card (for registration) required. No fees.

items.name: Kids Help Phone
items.access_script: Hi, I'm feeling really overwhelmed right now and just need someone to talk to. Is this a safe place to share?

items.name: Kids Help Phone
items.access_script: Call 1-800-668-6868 or text 686868. No fees. If you are in immediate danger, call 911.

items.name: Kingston Access Services (Access Bus)
items.access_script: Hi, I'd like to apply for the Access Bus service. How do I start the registration process?

items.name: Kingston Community Health Centres (KCHC) - Weller Clinic
items.name_fr: Centre de santé communautaire de Kingston (KCHC) - Clinique Weller
items.access_script: Hi, I'm pregnant and don't have a family doctor. Are you accepting new patients for prenatal care?

items.name: Kingston Community Legal Clinic
items.access_script: Hi, my landlord is threatening to evict me and I'd like to speak to a lawyer about my rights.

items.name: Kingston Community Legal Clinic
items.access_script: Call 613-541-0777. Proof of income required. No fees.

items.name: Kingston Detoxification Centre (KHSC)
items.access_script: Hi, I'm looking to get sober and need a safe place to detox. Do you have any beds available?

items.name: Kingston East Community Centre
items.access_script: Visit https://www.cityofkingston.ca for information.

items.name: Kingston Frontenac Public Library - Central Branch
items.name_fr: Bibliothèque publique Kingston Frontenac - Succursale centrale
items.access_script: Hi, I'd like to sign up for a library card. What ID do I need to bring?

items.name: Kingston General Hospital (KGH) Emergency Department
items.name_fr: Urgences de l'Hôpital général de Kingston (KGH)
items.access_script: Hi, I'm bringing in a friend who is having severe chest pain. Where is the best place to drop them off?

items.name: Kingston General Hospital (KGH) Emergency Department
items.name_fr: Service des urgences de l'Hôpital général de Kingston
items.access_script: Call 613-548-2333 for assistance, or visit https://kingstonhsc.ca/emergency-care.

items.name: Kingston Home Base Non-Profit Housing
items.access_script: Hi, I have nowhere to sleep tonight. Do you have any beds available?

items.name: Kingston Humane Society
items.name_fr: Société protectrice des animaux de Kingston
items.access_script: Visit https://kingstonhumanesociety.ca for information.

items.name: Kingston Interval House
items.access_script: I need a safe place to stay tonight away from my partner. Do you have any beds available?

items.name: Kingston Literacy & Skills
items.access_script: Call 613-547-2012 or email info@klsread.ca. SIN, Status in Canada required. No fees.

items.name: Kingston Literacy & Skills
items.access_script: Visit https://www.klsread.ca for information.

items.name: Kingston Military Family Resource Centre (KMFRC)
items.name_fr: Centre de ressources pour les familles des militaires de Kingston
items.access_script: Hi, my partner is being deployed and I'm looking for support resources for our family.

items.name: Kingston Military Family Resource Centre (KMFRC)
items.name_fr: Centre de ressources pour les familles des militaires de Kingston
items.access_script: Call 613-541-5010 ext. 271-5195 for assistance, or visit https://cfmws.ca/kingston.

items.name: Kingston Native Centre and Language Nest (KNCLN)
items.name_fr: Kingston Native Centre and Language Nest
items.access_script: Call 613-544-3065 or email info@kingstonnativecentre.org or visit 218 Concession St, Kingston, ON K7K 2B5. No fees.

items.name: Kingston Native Centre and Language Nest (KNCLN)
items.name_fr: Kingston Native Centre and Language Nest
items.access_script: Call 613-544-3065 or email info@kingstonnativecentre.org or visit 218 Concession St, Kingston, ON K7K 2B5. No fees.

items.name: Kingston Police (Non-Emergency)
items.access_script: Visit https://www.kpf.ca for information.

items.name: Kingston Pregnancy Care Centre
items.name_fr: Centre de soins de grossesse de Kingston
items.access_script: Visit https://kingstonpcc.com for information.

items.name: Kingston Transit Affordable Pass (MFAP)
items.access_script: Call 613-546-0000 or email contactus@cityofkingston.ca. Proof of income, Address, ID required. Fees: Discounted Rates.

items.name: Kingston Youth Shelter
items.name_fr: Refuge pour les jeunes de Kingston
items.access_script: Hi, I'm 19 and I got kicked out of my house. Can I stay at the shelter tonight?

items.name: Landlord and Tenant Board Contact Centre
items.name_fr: Centre de contact de la Commission de la location immobilière
items.access_script: Landlords and tenants in Ontario can call 1-888-332-3234 for information on landlord-tenant rules and Landlord and Tenant Board procedures. Staff can explain forms and processes but cannot provide legal advice.

items.name: Landlord's Self-Help Centre
items.access_script: Small-scale residential landlords in Ontario can call 1-800-730-3218 for free legal information and advice on tenancy issues. (This service is provided by a specialty legal clinic at no cost.)

items.name: Law Society Referral Service
items.access_script: Call 1-855-947-5255 to request a referral to a lawyer or paralegal through the Law Society Referral Service. You will receive a free 30-minute consultation with a legal professional.

items.name: Legal Aid Ontario
items.access_script: Low-income Ontario residents can call 1-800-668-8258 to apply for Legal Aid or to get legal advice over the phone. Eligibility for full representation is based on income (financial means testing will apply).

items.name: LGBT YouthLine
items.access_script: Youth (29 and under) can text 647-694-4275, email askus@youthline.ca, or live chat at youthline.ca for confidential peer support (Sun–Fri 4pm–9:30pm). If you are in immediate danger, call 911.

items.name: Lionhearts Fresh Food Market
items.access_script: Email info@freshfoodmkt.ca or visit Various Locations (Pop-up). Fees: Cost of goods subsidized.

items.name: Loving Spoonful
items.access_script: Hi, I'd like to learn more about joining a community garden or cooking workshop.

items.name: Lunch by George (Outreach St. George's Kingston)
items.access_script: Hi, I heard you offer a hot lunch. What time do you start serving?

items.name: Lung Health Line
items.access_script: Ontario residents with asthma, COPD, or other lung health concerns can call 1-888-344-5864 to speak with a Certified Respiratory Educator. This free helpline offers guidance on managing lung conditions.

items.name: Maltby Centre
items.access_script: Hi, I'm 17 and struggling with anxiety. Can I set up an appointment to talk to a counsellor?

items.name: Maltby Centre
items.access_script: Call 613-546-8535 for assistance, or visit https://maltbycentre.ca.

items.name: March of Dimes Canada - Employment Services
items.name_fr: La Marche des dix sous du Canada
items.access_script: Call 613-546-3396 for assistance, or visit https://www.marchofdimes.ca.

items.name: Martha's Table
items.access_script: Hi, I don't have any money for lunch today. Do you accept meal tickets?
